patterns.name: Guaranteed Returns
patterns.description: Any promise of guaranteed, assured, or fixed returns
patterns.example: Invest today and get guaranteed 40% returns in 6 months

patterns.name: Authority Impersonation
patterns.description: Fake claims of SEBI, RBI, or government approval
patterns.example: This scheme is SEBI approved and RBI backed

patterns.name: Artificial Urgency
patterns.description: Pressure to invest immediately with time limits
patterns.example: Only 50 slots left — offer closes TONIGHT!

patterns.name: FOMO Trigger
patterns.description: Fear of missing out language to pressure investment
patterns.example: 200 people have already made lakhs. Get in now before it is too late

patterns.name: Pump and Dump
patterns.description: Hot tips about stocks with unrealistic return claims
patterns.example: Hot tip — this stock will 10x. Secret FDA deal. Buy quietly before announcement

patterns.name: Deepfake Promotion
patterns.description: AI generated video or audio promoting investment
patterns.example: Watch this video of Mukesh Ambani recommending this investment scheme

patterns.name: Unregistered Entity
patterns.description: Entity claiming legitimacy without SEBI registration
patterns.example: Our exclusive offshore fund gives 30% annual returns

patterns.name: Unrealistic Returns
patterns.description: Returns promised far above market rates
patterns.example: Double your money in 30 days with our AI trading system

patterns.name: Direct Transfer Request
patterns.description: Asking investor to transfer funds to personal account
patterns.example: Wire transfer your funds directly to our CEO personal account today

patterns.name: Fake Finfluencer
patterns.description: Unregistered social media influencer charging for tips
patterns.example: Join our VIP Telegram group for Rs 999/month for daily stock tips

patterns.name: No Risk Claims
patterns.example: Our fund is 100% safe with zero risk and guaranteed returns

patterns.name: Social Proof Manipulation
patterns.description: Using fake testimonials or social proof to convince investors
patterns.example: Join 50,000 satisfied investors who have already made crores with us

metadata.source: SEBI enforcement orders and investigation records
